sub_modules.fpa_special_cases: Detects NaN, infinity, and zero operands and produces IEEE-style special-case results and flags.
sub_modules.fpa_add_core: Combinational datapath wrapper for unpacking, alignment, significand arithmetic, normalization, rounding, and flag generation.
sub_modules.fpa_unpack_align: Extracts sign, exponent, and fraction fields, chooses the larger-magnitude operand, aligns significands, and generates sticky information.
sub_modules.fpa_significand_add: Performs signed significand addition or subtraction and detects exact cancellation.
sub_modules.fpa_normalize_round: Normalizes the raw significand, applies the requested rounding mode, packs the result, and generates overflow or underflow flags.
